creator: makahomes17@gmail.com
text: This issue highlights the challenges of legacy media limitations in modern distributions. Transitioning to larger or alternative storage mediums, like USB drives, has become common for newer releases. An additional solution could include exploring high-performance storage options such as the SATA 6Gbps SSD/3.84TB-RI-2.5Inch https://serverorbit.com/solid-state-drives-ssd/sata-6gbps-ssd/3-84tb-ri-2-5inch for distribution storage and deployment. Such options not only address capacity concerns but also significantly improve data transfer speeds, streamlining installation processes. Has there been consideration for optimizing ISO files for smaller media or providing split image options for 700MB CD-ROMs?
